spec_match.rationale: Calculates block duration from render quantum size and sample rate — the core trade-off the spec describes (larger blocks reduce callback overhead but increase latency).

interactive.rationale: Real spinbuttons for sample rate and render quantum with a live calculate button and status readout.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Promises a latency calculator; delivers a working one with default vs requested comparison.

edge_cases.rationale: Shows the trade-off comparison but doesn't cover edge values like 64-frame minimum or non-standard sample rates.

runtime_evidence.rationale: Browser-tested: spinbuttons default to 48000/192, calculation shows 4.00ms, default vs requested comparison renders. No console errors.

telemetry_health.rationale: Calculator concept, no tracked events expected.
